raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I went to Best Buy to purchase a dishwasher and was told by the salesperson that I could open a CitiBank credit card and save some money, so I did. After talking to my daughter, the next day XX/XX/XXXX, I decided to cancel the order and so I called Best Buy and was told the order and the credit application was cancelled. 
In May, I received a bill from Citibank to {$59.00} annual fee. I called Citibank and was told the application was cancelled and they would removed the fee. 
Then, last Thursday, XX/XX/XXXX, I received another bill from Citibank for {$59.00} fee and {$30.00} late fee! 
I called Citibank today, with the help of my adult daughter, explained what we were told and after XXXX minutes and XXXX transfers we were transferred to a manager that told us we would have to call Best Buy to clear this up. 
I called the manager at Best Buy who said I would need to reach out to Citibank yet again as the charges are from Citibank.
